title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXVII. Charms.
content:
Cushy cow bonny, let down thy milk,
        And I will give thee a gown of silk;
        A gown of silk and a silver tee,
        If thou wilt let down thy milk to me.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXVII. Charms." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
